summary: Full end-to-end testing of Detail Inspector BMW landing (FastAPI + React + MongoDB). All 10 backend API tests pass (health, calculator pricing engine for X5/XM scenarios, lead create/list/validation). All 9 frontend critical flows pass (hero, header CTA → lead dialog, lead submit success, 4-step calculator quiz with real /api/calculate + /api/leads integration, team tabs, cases modal, guarantee doc modal with prev/next, FAQ accordion, final CTA). No critical issues found. Only a few minor non-functional console warnings from Radix Dialog about missing DialogTitle/aria-describedby for accessibility.

minor.issue: `logger` is referenced inside create_lead but defined at module bottom (line 186, after include_router). Works at request time but is fragile ordering — move logging.basicConfig + logger above route definitions.

Python int(round(...)) uses banker's rounding (e.g. 642.5 → 642). XM + Смена цвета + После другой студии = 642 000 ₽, not 643 000. Functionally fine, but spec expectation of 643k won't always match — document or switch to math.floor((x+500)/1000)*1000 if exact 643000 is required.

design_issues.screen: All Radix Dialogs (LeadDialog, Cases, Guarantee, ExitIntent)
issues: Console warnings: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for accessibility' and 'Missing Description or aria-describedby'. Add VisuallyHidden DialogTitle/Description or aria-describedby to each DialogContent for a11y compliance.

action_items: Reorder /app/backend/server.py so `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` and basicConfig are defined BEFORE route handlers that use it (currently defined after include_router).
Add VisuallyHidden <DialogTitle>/<DialogDescription> (or aria-describedby) to all Radix DialogContent usages (LeadDialog, Cases, Guarantee, ExitIntent) to remove a11y console warnings.
Optional: align /api/calculate rounding so XM+Смена цвета+После другой студии returns 643 000 instead of 642 000 if the spec expects exactly 643k (banker's rounding currently rounds 642.5 → 642).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` used before assignment in module order — relies on Python late binding. Move logger setup above routes.
server.py: /api/leads phone validation is len < 5; matches spec but consider stricter normalization (digits-only length >= 10) to match frontend Calculator validation.
All DialogContent components should include accessible title/description (Radix a11y warnings present).
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed leads via POST /api/leads during testing (TEST_Ivan, +79990000002). Stored in MongoDB `leads` collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at /api/health, /api/calculate, /api/leads (POST+GET). Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Pricing engine maps in server.py: MODEL_BASE, TASK_MULT, CONDITION_ADJ. Note banker's rounding affects XM scenario. All data-testid selectors verified. Calculator quiz uses ids: calc-model-{model}, calc-task-{full|risk|anti|color}, calc-cond-{new|chips|redo}, then calc-phone-input, calc-next-btn → calc-result. Team has 4 members (andrey/ivan/roman/yuriy). AnimatePresence mode='wait' on team-card needs >=1200ms between tab clicks for content swap to complete.
rca of the issue: No production-blocking issues found. Two minor RCAs: (1) logger ordering in server.py — works via Python's late name resolution but bad practice; (2) banker's rounding in /api/calculate gives 642 000 instead of expected 643 000 for one edge case (price > 600000 assertion still satisfied).
